title: rework camera controls, scene angles & figure interaction
description:
## Summary

- **feat(brett): rework camera controls, scene angles & figure interaction** — Overhauls the 3D board's camera system with improved orbit controls, predefined scene angles, and more intuitive figure interaction handling.
- **fix(brett): move setActiveTool init after HINTS declaration (T000362)** — Fixes a runtime crash where `setActiveTool` was called before the `HINTS` constant was declared, resolving ticket T000362.

## Test plan

- [ ] Open brett board and verify camera orbit/pan/zoom controls work smoothly
- [ ] Check that predefined scene angle presets load the correct camera positions
- [ ] Interact with figures (drag, select, place) and confirm no regressions
- [ ] Verify no JS console errors on board load (setActiveTool init fix)
- [ ] Smoke test: `task brett:logs ENV=mentolder` shows no startup errors after deploy

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
